title: FOMO on Meme Street II - Vitalik VS Shiba
relevance_summary: Donation of large amounts of tokens to charities by a prominent figure after removing liquidity

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends tokens to a charity wallet after removing liquidity from a pool

red_flags: Large token transfers to charity wallets shortly after liquidity removal
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends tokens to a charity wallet after removing liquidity from a pool
summary: Vitalik Buterin removed liquidity from the SHIB-WETH Uniswap pool and donated a significant portion of the tokens to various charities. This could be seen as a rug pull if not for Vitalik's reputation. A guard could have detected this by blocking token transfers to charity wallets after liquidity removal.
